title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Breakfast in bed. I'm going to start with the pop up bagels because I like to eat savory food first. Today they had peppermint chocolates and rosemary butter. I went for the rosemary butter.

You can see there are so many seeds on here. It is packed with seeds. I'm going to follow their instructions in the store. It said grip rip in dip. I am dipping it. I really like the flavor of the cream cheese. My only regret is that we didn't try it right away. It's still delicious but definitely if you get this I think it needs to be eaten as soon as possible. Is it worth the hype? In my opinion yes. Next up is crumble cookie. I am probably most excited to review this one because I think my algorithm knows that I'm a cookie monster. Now it's finally my turn. We got the four pack and it ended up being about 20 dollars. I chose the hot chocolate cookie. I had to get a classic chocolate chip cookie. title: will / shall
examples: Let's head to our first stop. Our first stop of the day is pop up bagels. This has been all over my TikTok feed. So let's go get our bagels. Can I do a three pack with one smear and I'll do the rosemary garlic butter please. Oh everything bagel please.

It's fresh. One good thing about New York, there's always seats. We went to a lot of takeout places or carry out places today but there's a lot of public places where you can just sit and eat. Is this worth the hype? That's an easy yes. I want to rank what was my favorite viral food to my least favorite viral food. Number one, crumble cookie. I can definitely see why it gets so much hype delicious. Must go to crumble cookie. The good thing about crumble is that it's a franchise so if you visit California or Vegas you can also get crumble cookies. Those are a must. Trust me.

Number two, I will say surprisingly the hot chocolate. I'm usually not a big dessert eater. I don't have a huge sweet tooth but today I loved all the sweet things that we ate. The toasted marshmallow along the rim of the cup made it perfect. Number three, I'm going to have to say this hello food.

Everything in this little box just works. I love the meat, the rice, the sauce. It was served piping hot. It's just very delicious. Number four, pop up bagels. I thought pop up bagels was really delicious but I feel like I didn't eat it the way it's supposed to be eaten so I have a lot of regret about that. When you're in New York, bagels are iconic and a must eat food but the way that pop up bagels are served, I think you must eat it right away when they serve it to you. Don't wait for it to harden. You need to eat it when it's nice and fresh and hot. Finally, number five, I'm going to say raisin canes. I liked raisin canes and I would definitely go again especially for that sauce. I hope they bottle that sauce and sell it. I'm going to look on Amazon later. I think raisin canes was better than KFC but not as good as Korean fried chicken of course so it's not a must go for me. If you're in the area, in your hungry, then it's still a great option. I hope you enjoyed eating some of New York City's most viral foods with me today. I ate way too many calories but it was worth it. Please subscribe to my channel.
